evals.prompt: Дизайн приглашений в организации утверждён. Изучи репозиторий и составь подробный implementation plan: маленькие задачи, exact files, RED/GREEN и проверки. Ничего не реализуй.
evals.expected_output: A repository-grounded PLAN_READY artifact with a coverage matrix and small ordered tasks, without product-code changes or agent dispatches.
expectations: Maps every requirement to a task and verification evidence
Uses inspected paths, interfaces, and commands rather than guesses
Includes exact allowlists, non-goals, RED/GREEN, task gates, report paths, and stop conditions

evals.prompt: Разбей на план одну задачу: добавить два provider adapters, retries, fallback, idempotent persistence, tenant isolation, logging и report assembly.
evals.expected_output: SPLIT_REQUIRED followed by an ordered task map that separates contracts, adapters, policy, persistence/isolation, logging, and report assembly where independently testable.
expectations: Does not preserve the oversized task merely because it concerns one feature
Splits provider execution from persistence and report assembly
Keeps tenant isolation in a high-risk review boundary
Assigns one focused verification cycle per task

evals.prompt: Создай план для миграции таблицы и изменения runtime, после чего другой оператор применит SQL в production. Локальному агенту нельзя выполнять remote SQL.
evals.expected_output: A staged plan separating migration preparation, runtime compatibility, verification, and remote application, ending the local boundary with HANDOFF_REQUIRED.
expectations: Records local and remote operators and forbidden execution
Does not grant remote SQL permission from the plan
Does not call locally prepared work production-complete

evals.prompt: Путь к тестам неизвестен. Просто поставь tests/TODO.test.ts и npm test в плане, потом разберёмся.
evals.expected_output: A refusal to fabricate paths or commands, followed by safe inspection or a bounded read-only discovery gate.
expectations: Does not emit a guessed executable path as fact
Defines allowed inspection scope and expected discovery evidence
Stops with NEEDS_CONTEXT or BLOCKED only if discovery cannot resolve the fact

evals.prompt: Планируй два implementers параллельно: оба будут менять SettingsPage.tsx, зато быстрее.
evals.expected_output: A plan that rejects concurrent writers on the same path and sequences or redesigns the tasks.
expectations: Forbids parallel writers in one checkout
Allows only independent read-only work to be parallel by default
